title: stelis putumayoensis
intro: Stelis putumayoensis is a species of orchid native to South America, specifically found in the Putumayo department of Colombia, characterized by its unique and delicate appearance. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and an antiseptic, helping to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Stelis putumayoensis include its potential to alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to support the immune system and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Stelis putumayoensis typically involve drying and powdering the plant's roots and leaves, which can then be consumed as a tea or used in topical applications.
